title: Utils (resilience)
items: checkpoint + adapters — save_graph_checkpoint / restore_graph_checkpoint, memory / dict / file / SQLite adapters

title: Reactive output consistency (no Promise/Future in public APIs)
items: Public APIs avoid async def / Awaitable return types; async wrapped as reactive sources
Higher-order callback parameters accept sync scalar, Node, Awaitable, Iterable, AsyncIterable via from_any coercion
first_value_from remains end-user sync escape hatch only
Checkpoint adapters are synchronous (save -> None, load -> dict | None)

title: Composite data patterns
items: verifiable(source, verify_fn, opts?) — value node + verification companion
distill(source, extract_fn, opts) — budget-constrained reactive memory store
